# MERN Templates

The MERN family is useful when teams want a mostly JavaScript end-to-end stack with flexible app patterns.

## Planned Categories

- admin dashboard starter
- CRUD application starter
- real-time chat starter
- marketplace starter
- internal tool starter

## What These Pages Should Clarify

- why MERN is a good fit
- where MongoDB is a strong choice
- when PostgreSQL would be a better default
- what scaling and data-modeling tradeoffs come with the stack
